name: Ubiquiti UNAS 4 Black
title: Ubiquiti UNAS 4 Black
short_description: High Capacity NAS. Built in a desktop form factor, it combines high capacity storage options with efficient performance. Features four drive bays compatible with both 2.5 inch and 3.5 inch hard drives, two dedicated M.2 NVMe slots, and a 2.5 GbE Ethernet interface.
description: The Ubiquiti UNAS 4 is a compact and powerful network attached storage solution designed to deliver reliable data management for both professional and advanced home environments. Built in a desktop form factor, it combines high capacity storage options with efficient performance, making it suitable for centralized file storage, backups, and media management. The device features four drive bays compatible with both 2.5 inch and 3.5 inch hard drives, allowing users to configure storage based on their performance and capacity needs. In addition, two dedicated M.2 NVMe slots enable high speed SSD caching, significantly improving data access times and overall system responsiveness. This hybrid storage approach ensures a balance between large capacity and fast performance.

detailed_description.heading: High Capacity NAS
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UNAS 4 is a compact and powerful network attached storage solution designed to deliver reliable data management for both professional and advanced home environments. Built in a desktop form factor, it combines high capacity storage options with efficient performance, making it suitable for centralized file storage, backups, and media management. The device features four drive bays compatible with both 2.5 inch and 3.5 inch hard drives, allowing users to configure storage based on their performance and capacity needs. In addition, two dedicated M.2 NVMe slots enable high speed SSD caching, significantly improving data access times and overall system responsiveness. This hybrid storage approach ensures a balance between large capacity and fast performance.

detailed_description.heading: Smart Data Management
detailed_description.text: The UNAS 4 is powered by a robust software platform that enables advanced data management and protection features. It supports multiple RAID configurations, including RAID 5, RAID 6, RAID 10, and single drive setups, allowing users to balance redundancy, performance, and storage capacity based on their specific needs. The system is designed to support both personal and shared storage environments, making it suitable for collaborative workflows as well as individual use. Built in file sharing capabilities allow users to generate secure share links, while support for user groups ensures controlled access to stored data.

detailed_description.heading: Reliable Hardware Design
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UNAS 4 is built on a reliable hardware platform designed for consistent performance and efficient operation. It is powered by a quad core ARM Cortex A55 processor running at 1.7 GHz, combined with 4 GB of system memory. This configuration enables smooth handling of multiple tasks, including file transfers, backups, and application services. The device operates using PoE+++ as its primary power method, with a 90W adapter included for easy deployment. With a maximum power consumption of 90W, it maintains an efficient balance between performance and energy usage. The compact enclosure, constructed from durable polycarbonate, ensures long term reliability while keeping the overall footprint minimal.
